reason: Progression reads clearly across three vertical sub-panels of the same right arm at the same three-quarter angle: intact tensing sleeve, then a burst seam with a ballooning bicep, then the sleeve gone with veins surfacing and full turnaround-level mass only in stage 3. The stage-3 face enters frame at genuine peak strain (squeezed eyes, furrowed brow, gritted bared teeth) matching s01-01's intensity, fixing the prior calm-face failure. Identity holds (dark skin, teal hoodie, afro), and all hard rules pass: photoreal DAZ3D, no baked text/SFX, two fists only (both hers, no extra limbs), torso coverage intact, only Zara in frame, with lamp warmth and teal book-glow continuous from s01-01.
